title: Security Zones Diagram
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for security zones diagram
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Identify the three concentric security zones in the Claude skills architecture: project, skills, and system
Distinguish which files belong in each zone, from project-specific files to the global skills directory to critical system files and credentials
Explain why the system zone containing credentials and system files requires stricter access controls than the project zone
Classify a given file or directory into the correct security zone based on its sensitivity and scope
